name: tessera-playtest-orchestrator
description: Thin fan-out: dispatches a list of pre-rendered playtest instructions to the existing tessera-playtest-scenario task. Each child gets one role's full instruction string, runs it in its own Daytona container, and returns its per-player JSON. Aggregation happens client-side by reading the child trajectories. The caller is expected to render the instructions (one per role, with code + host_token already substituted) before triggering.
